postconditions: result == ((decision_code == SUBMIT_DECISION_ACCEPT && pending_slot_points_to_new && new_current_written && queued_loc_written && !replacement_old_removed) || (decision_code == SUBMIT_DECISION_REPLACE && pending_slot_points_to_new && new_current_written && queued_loc_written && replacement_old_removed))
acceptance_criteria: Accept transitions require new current pending and queued location evidence and must not remove an old tx; Replace transitions require the same writes plus old tx removal evidence; low, gap, and conflict decisions are rejected by adapter output.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core submit_transition_requires_nonce_acceptance_and_adapter_writes && cargo test -p ic-evm-core replacement_requires_higher_effective_fee
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core submit transition cases plus evm-core replacement adapter test
